title: Junior SEO Specialist at Treebo Hotels

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Treebo Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Treebo Hotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
